content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:22 and its neighbor atoms. Looking at the molecular structure:

Atom C:22 (carbon) is connected to:
- C:21 (carbon) - to the left
- C:23 (carbon) - to the right  
- H:30 (hydrogen) - above/right

The geomconf_index for this molecule appears to be 3963, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_3963.xyz".

So the neighbor atoms of atom 22 are:
- Atomic index 21, element C
- Atomic index 23, element C  
- Atomic index 30, element H

Geomconf_index: 3963

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
